chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No. D-529 of 2025 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A No. 1835/2025. (Urgency Application) 2. For orders on office objection flag ‘A’. 3. For orders on M.A No. 1836/2025. (Exemption Application) 4. For orders on withdrawal statement as flag ‘B’. 5. For hearing of main case. 04-06-2025 Mr. Abdul Rasheed Pathan, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the very outset, learned advocate for petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge Judge
